# Purchase Order Qty change no recompute

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:5c103b979fdac08b341d37749594840d8b676b390f1004e91b4356b614e794d2
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module prevents to recompute if only quantity has changed in
purchase order line.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Create a new purchase order.
2. Add product line and set custom unit price.
3. Save purchase order.
4. Edit purchase order and change quantity (custom unit price not been
   reset).

functions.name: odoo.addons.purchase_order_qty_change_no_recompute.monkeypatching.get_depends
documentation:
Override of the Python method to remove the dependency of the unit fields.
We also need to add product_id as depends, so that the initial computation is done.
